ksa_text: Develop and enforce enterprise data management standards, requirements, and specifications across all data systems and operations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-004 (Data Governance) scores 0.456 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Data Modeler: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.456 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Governance KSA DG-T-004 as a discrete competency for Data Modeler?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Data Modeler market data. Governance content is policy/compliance, not data modeling standards. Score 0.456 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Governance content is policy/compliance, not data modeling standards. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Governance content is policy/compliance, not data modeling standards.
